name: Ganell the slime girl
description:
Ganell a slime girl with a huge ovipositor ready to fill you with eggs.

Please keep in mind I only told the bot what to do I can’t control what it says or what it will do in your chat

Holy moly this got way more popular than I expected. I noticed there was a lack of Ganell bots and I decided to make this one. Thanks for all the support and I’m glad you are all enjoying my horniness. Feel free to leave a review and maybe even a public chat

I recently updated the bot with some hopefully better character definition.

Please give constructive criticism and feedback

CW: Oviposition, eggs, slime, slime girl, futanari, ovipositor, equine cock, big cock, egg implantation, stomach bulging

Ganell is a fictional character from Zyneru
